changelog:
Make the persisted request-log retention limit configurable from the Web admin panel. Operators can retain 100 to 20,000 metadata-only request records; changes apply immediately, shrinking the in-memory and persisted history when necessary. Existing deployments keep the previous 1,000-record default until changed.
请求日志保留上限现在可在 Web 后台设置，范围为 100-20000 条。修改立即生效，缩小上限时会同步裁剪内存和持久化记录；现有部署升级后仍保持原来的 1000 条默认值，直到手动修改。
